incorrects.description: Student placed one or more bars incorrectly on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Check the data table and look at the axis lines carefully.

incorrects.description: Student placed one or more bars incorrectly on second attempt

params.description: Ava bar position highlights on axis at 50.

steps.text: Ava walked 50 miles. That's right at the 50 line. The others are between lines. Find where each bar ends by counting by 10s, then add 5 if it's halfway.

incorrects.description: Student placed one or more bars incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System demonstrates placing each bar: Kai at 35 (between 30 and 40), Ava at 50 (at the line), Noah at 25 (between 20 and 30), Zoe at 45 (between 40 and 50).

steps.text: Let me show you. Kai walked 35 miles. That's between 30 and 40, halfway. Ava walked 50, right at the 50 line. Noah walked 25, halfway between 20 and 30. Zoe walked 45, halfway between 40 and 50. When a value ends in 5, it's always halfway between two lines on a scale of 10.
